topic: Determination of Forward and Futures Prices
title: Cost of Carry: The cost of carry refers...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: The cost of carry refers to:

options.text: The cost of carry refers to the total cost of holding a position in an asset,

solution: The cost of carry refers to the total cost of holding a position in an asset, including storage costs and financing costs. [[29]]
